description: On-chain activity of the Morpheus AI network on Base mainnet, decoded from events into a queryable SQL snapshot, complete through watermark_block.

excluded_tables.name: sync_state
excluded_tables.reason: internal indexer sync cursors; a consumer resumes from watermark_block

excluded_tables.name: builder_sync_state
excluded_tables.reason: internal builder-sync cursor; consumer resumes from watermark_block

excluded_tables.name: usage_counters
excluded_tables.reason: indexer API usage counters (tied to api_keys)

excluded_tables.name: key_history
excluded_tables.reason: the indexer's own signing-key history (operational identity)

excluded_tables.name: provenance_receipts
excluded_tables.reason: the indexer's per-response signatures over its cached data; the dataset carries its own signed receipt instead

excluded_tables.name: signer_attestations
excluded_tables.reason: the indexer's signer identity (derived-address to staking-wallet binding)

excluded_tables.name: service_attestations
excluded_tables.reason: the indexer's signed Merkle rollups (operational identity)

provenance: Snapshot produced and signed by DRM3 Labs. Verify morpheus-ai-base-data.receipt.json against the Ed25519 key in keys.json.
